moves.name: Null Signal Strike
moves.description: Synthara raises her right arm to shoulder height, chrome-tipped fingers splayed, then snaps her wrist forward and drives all five nails in a rigid flat-handed thrust directly at the opponent's chest, releasing a concentrated pulse from the nanobot interfaces along her forearm on impact. The move is a single precise linear strike with no wind-up arc, relying entirely on mechanical accuracy over brute force.
moves.image_snapshot: Standing upright with weight on left foot, right arm fully extended straight forward at chest height, fingers rigid and splayed wide with chrome nails forward-facing, left arm pulled tight against the ribs with fist closed, torso facing forward, head level with silver-grey eyes fixed ahead, iridescent seam lines along the extended forearm glowing faintly. Speed lines on right forearm and hand.

moves.name: Overclock Heel Drop
moves.description: Synthara launches straight upward from a standing position, tucks both knees briefly at the apex, then snaps her right leg downward in a vertical axe-kick, driving her heel in a straight line from above her own head down toward the opponent's skull. The descent is near-instantaneous due to nanobot-assisted muscle acceleration along her thigh and calf.
moves.image_snapshot: Airborne at apex, body nearly vertical, right leg fully extended straight downward with heel pointed at the ground, left leg bent at the knee with foot pulled up behind her thigh, both arms extended outward from the shoulders for balance, ponytail suspended upward above her head, torso upright, chin level. Motion blur on right leg from hip to heel.

moves.name: Seraphic Data Burst
moves.description: Synthara plants her feet wide, tilts her head back slightly, and forces a violent discharge through all nanobot interface seams simultaneously — neck, shoulders, and both forearms — erupting in a radial wave of visible electromagnetic interference that physically staggers anything within close range. The move requires no limb contact and originates entirely from the seam lines across her upper body.
moves.image_snapshot: Wide stance with both feet planted flat, knees slightly bent, arms thrown outward from the body at forty-five degrees with fingers splayed and chrome nails extended, head tilted back, chin up, eyes open, all seam lines along the neck, shoulders, and forearms radiating sharp light outward, back arched slightly, hair and loose strands of the ponytail pushed outward from the body. Speed lines radiating outward from the seam lines on both forearms and the collar of the neck.
